data.name: ActiveGameSessionExistsError
data.value: There is an active game session for this guild. Please wait until it ends.

data.name: CheckPMForContractInfo
data.value: Check your private messages to sign the employment contract.

data.name: DontShowDocumentWarning
data.value: Do not show this document to anyone!

data.name: HostLeftLobbyInfo
data.value: The host has left the lobby. The meeting is cancelled.

data.name: IntroDayMessageInfo
data.value: 👋 **Welcome to Paranoia Corp!** The introductory day is starting. Introductory Day is about to begin. Please collect your job badge and confirm your attendance.

data.name: ObservePlayerNumberEqualsRolesWarning
data.value: Observe: The number of players must match the number of roles in the pool.

data.name: OnlyHostCanConfigureRoleError
data.value: Only the host can configure the role pool

data.name: OnlyHostCanStartGameError
data.value: Only the host can start the game.

data.name: OpenDMWarning
data.value: The HR department was unable to deliver contracts to the following individuals: {0}. **Please allow the server to send you Direct Messages in your privacy settings!**

data.name: PlayerAlreadyInLobbyError
data.value: You are already in the lobby.

data.name: PlayerIsNotInLobbyError
data.value: You are not in the lobby.

data.name: PrepareGameUnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while preparing the game session

data.name: UniqueRolePresentError
data.value: There can be only one unique role.

data.name: WaitingForEmployeesInfo
data.value: Waiting for employees to start the workday.

data.name: MorningReadyMessageInfo
data.value: ☕ **Morning Briefing:** Review the nightly events and prepare for the board meeting.

data.name: VetoReminderMessage
data.value: The General Director has {0} vetoes remaining.

data.name: BoardMeetingStartTitle
data.value: ☀️ **Board meeting is starting:** Please proceed to the meeting room.

data.name: NoCandidatesForFireInfo
data.value: No candidates for firing this round!

data.name: GeneralDirectorCanSelectCandidateReminder
data.value: Everyone is safe... for now. The General Director now can choose anyone to fire on their will... or do not choose at all.

data.name: DirectorBoardOverTitle
data.value: **Board is over.** The fired employee has time to say their final words.

data.name: EmployeeMustRevealRoleInfo
data.value: The employee <@{0}> must reveal their identity.

data.name: TokenNotificationInfo
data.value: 📢 **Token Notification** You have {0} reports left to write.

data.name: WorkdayOverTitle
data.value: 🌙 **Workday is over.** Overtime begins. The office is closed. Open the terminal to perform action you want to and click -Ready-.

data.name: YouNotInGameError
data.value: You are not registered for this game.

data.name: OnlyDirectorStartBoardError
data.value: ❌ **Access Denied:** Only the General Director has the right to open the Board meeting.

data.name: YouOpenBoardMessage
data.value: ✅ You have successfully opened the board. Employees are invited to the meeting.

data.name: OnlyDirectorMakeDecision
data.value: ❌ Only the General Director can make personnel decisions.

data.name: CandidateRegisteredToFireInfo
data.value: Candidate registered in the system. Click -Fire- to confirm.

data.name: UseVetoDeniedError
data.value: ❌ Only the General Director can use the Veto power.

data.name: YouNotHaveVetoError
data.value: ❌ You have no more Veto power or it has already been used in this cycle.

data.name: VetoUsedInfo
data.value: **General Director** used the Veto power.\n The list of candidates for dismissal has been expanded to all living employees. The Director can also decide not to dismiss anyone.

data.name: NoPlayerChosenToFireError
data.value: ❌ First, choose an employee from the list.

data.name: DirectorMadeDesicionInfo
data.value: The General Director has made their decision. Employee <@{0}> has been terminated from the corporation.

data.name: CannotSkipBoardError
data.value: ❌ This option is only available after using the Veto Right or if there is no candidates for firing.

data.name: DirectorDecisionMercyInfo
data.value: The General Director has decided to show mercy. No one will be terminated today.

data.name: OnlyDirectorOrFiredPlayerEndDayError
data.value: ❌ **Access Denied:** Only the General Director or the fired employee can end the day.

data.name: FinalWordRecorderTitle
data.value: ✅ Your final words have been recorded. The workday is complete.

data.name: DirectorInterruptDebateInfo
data.value: ✅ You have interrupted the debates and concluded the workday.

data.name: NoAccessTerminalError
data.value: You do not have access to the terminal.

data.name: SelectTargetMessage
data.value: Select a target to exercise your authority, or simply skip turn.

data.name: SelectFirstTargetMessage
data.value: Choose the first target to exercise your authority...

data.name: SelectSecondTargetMessage
data.value: Choose the second target to exercise your authority...

data.name: YouCanSelectYourselfInfo
data.value: You can choose yourself or the same target!

data.name: TerminalSessionExpiredWarning
data.value: Your session has expired. Please close and reopen the terminal.

data.name: TargetSelectionClearedMessage
data.value: All target selections have been cleared. Click -Ready- if you want to skip your turn.

data.name: TargetSelectionNotFinishedError
data.value: ❌ **Warning:** You haven't finished your selection! Please select ALL required targets, or clear selection and then skip your turn.

data.name: OvertimeReadyMessage
data.value: ✅ You have finished working in the terminal. The system has recorded your input. Wait for your colleagues.

data.name: WinnerFactionTitle
data.value: The Corporate War is over. The winning faction is: **{0}**

data.name: DrawWinnerTitle
data.value: The market collapsed. No winner was identified, and the corporation was declared bankrupt.

data.name: EndGameSessionDeleteTitle
data.value: 🔒 **The game session has been deleted from the system's memory.** Any interaction with terminals and buttons is blocked. You can discuss the game results here. The organizer can manually delete this channel.
